legacyOptions.rawQuery: SELECT plugged_in_at AS time, COALESCE(vehicle_name, 'Car') || ' plugged in @ ' || soc_percent || '% → ' || target_percent || '%' AS text, action AS tags FROM charge_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(plugged_in_at)

spec.description: Ohme + Hyundai IONIQ 5 autocharge: live status, charging trends, daily energy/cost/savings and session history.

spec.title: Charging power
spec.description: Power drawn at the charger over time.

spec.rawSql: SELECT recorded_at AS "time", power_watts AS "Power" FROM telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at) ORDER BY recorded_at

spec.title: Battery SOC vs target
spec.description: Car state of charge against the configured stop target.

spec.rawSql: SELECT recorded_at AS "time", battery_percent AS "Battery", target_percent AS "Target" FROM telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at) ORDER BY recorded_at

spec.title: Total energy
spec.description: Energy charged across the selected range.

spec.rawSql: SELECT SUM(energy_kwh) AS "Total energy" FROM daily_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(stat_date)
SELECT SUM(cost) AS "Total cost" FROM daily_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(stat_date)

spec.title: Total savings
spec.description: Savings vs a flat tariff, as reported by Ohme.

spec.rawSql: SELECT SUM(savings) AS "Total savings" FROM daily_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(stat_date)

spec.title: Avg cost / kWh
spec.description: Blended cost per kWh over the selected range.

spec.rawSql: SELECT SUM(cost) / NULLIF(SUM(energy_kwh), 0) AS "Avg cost/kWh" FROM daily_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(stat_date)
SELECT to_char(stat_date, 'Dy DD Mon') AS "Day", energy_kwh AS "Energy" FROM daily_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(stat_date) ORDER BY stat_date
SELECT to_char(stat_date, 'Dy DD Mon') AS "Day", cost AS "Cost", savings AS "Savings" FROM daily_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(stat_date) ORDER BY stat_date

spec.title: Cumulative savings
spec.description: Running total of savings over the selected range.

spec.rawSql: SELECT stat_date AS "time", SUM(savings) OVER (ORDER BY stat_date) AS "Cumulative savings" FROM daily_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(stat_date) ORDER BY stat_date

spec.title: Battery SOC
spec.description: Most recent state of charge reported by the car.

spec.rawSql: SELECT battery_percent AS "SOC" FROM telemetry WHERE battery_percent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1

spec.title: Plug-ins
spec.description: Charge sessions started in the selected range.

spec.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Plug-ins" FROM charge_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(plugged_in_at)

spec.title: Charges configured
spec.description: Sessions where Ohme was set up to top up.

spec.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Configured" FROM charge_sessions WHERE action = 'configured' AND $__timeFilter(plugged_in_at)

spec.title: Already at target
spec.description: Sessions skipped because the car was already at/above target.

spec.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Skipped" FROM charge_sessions WHERE action = 'skipped_at_target' AND $__timeFilter(plugged_in_at)
SELECT action AS "metric", COUNT(*) AS "value" FROM charge_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(plugged_in_at) GROUP BY action ORDER BY "value" DESC

SELECT plugged_in_at AS "Plugged in", vehicle_name AS "Vehicle", soc_percent AS "SOC %", target_percent AS "Target %", topup_percent AS "Top-up %", action AS "Action" FROM charge_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(plugged_in_at) ORDER BY plugged_in_at DESC LIMIT 100

spec.title: Latest charge schedules
spec.description: Ohme smart-charge slots captured when each session was configured.

spec.rawSql: SELECT recorded_at AS "Recorded", next_slot_start AS "Next slot start", next_slot_end AS "Next slot end", slots AS "Slots" FROM schedule_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at) ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 20

spec.title: Charging power
spec.description: Latest power draw at the charger.

spec.rawSql: SELECT power_watts AS "Power" FROM telemetry ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1

spec.title: Charger status
spec.description: Latest reported charger status and plug state.

spec.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN connected THEN initcap(replace(COALESCE(charger_status, 'unknown'), '_', ' ')) ELSE 'Unplugged' END AS "Status" FROM telemetry ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1

spec.title: This session
spec.description: Energy delivered in the current/last charging session.

spec.rawSql: SELECT session_energy_wh / 1000.0 AS "Session energy" FROM telemetry ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_amps AS "Current" FROM telemetry ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_volts AS "Voltage" FROM telemetry ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1

spec.title: Charge target
spec.description: Stop-charging target currently configured on Ohme.

spec.rawSql: SELECT target_percent AS "Target" FROM telemetry WHERE target_percent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1

spec.title: Ohme Autocharge
